series_metadata.series_description: Journals containing all entries and orders signed by the Commissioners and Attorney Examiners. Series includes Formal Journals, Motor Carrier Permit Journals, Motor Carrier Certificate Journals, and Rate Journals.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until transferred to microfilm and microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until system is determined obsolete, then transfer to new system. ; Microform: Retain permanently. Copy sent to State Archives., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Other ; Microform: Permanent
